speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , my God . I can't take it any more .

speaker: speaker2
text: What's wrong , honey ? Take it easy .

speaker: speaker1
text: I am tired of doing that boring work . I just repeat doing counting everyday . It's so terrible .

speaker: speaker2
text: Me too . But I think we can do something else for a change .

speaker: speaker1
text: You know I work with my professional knowledge not passion . Sometimes I don't know what the meaning of working is ?

speaker: speaker2
text: But you did a good job . You always perform the best in our company .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , that's in the past . Maybe I need to go to my psychologist for help .

speaker: speaker2
text: Perhaps you've just tired and you need a vacation .

speaker: speaker1
text: I was full of ambitions before . But now I have no aim for my career .

speaker: speaker2
text: Maybe we should keep on studying to enrich our knowledge and make our life exciting .

speaker: speaker1
text: That sounds interesting . But I don't know how to do that .

speaker: speaker1
text: A training course ? That must be costly .

speaker: speaker2
text: But it's worth it . Maybe it can get us into a good mood and also helps us learn something to use for the future .
